sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports pain. The patient reports pain in the left hand.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: There is right inguinal lymph node with slightly atypical consistency. The patient has a right inguinal lymph node with slightly atypical consistency.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient is being evaluated for a possible malignancy. The patient is being evaluated for a possible malignancy.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Recommend an ultrasound of the right inguinal lymph node to rule out metastatic disease. Skin graft closure may be needed. The patient is a candidate for wide local excision with a one to two centimeter margin. The patient is a candidate for wide local excision with a one to two centimeter margin.
